aliasTables.description: Provide alias tables with a (`alias` String, `select` String, `type` String) schema to use as a source for column selection.

configMode.description: Choose how this datasource is used. 'Single table' provides a focused, compact query editor for one table. 'All databases' gives full access to explore any database and table.

connMaxLifetime.description: Maximum lifetime of a connection in minutes

customSettings.description: Additional ClickHouse settings sent with every query as SETTINGS name=value.

defaultDatabase.description: the default database used by the query builder

defaultTable.description: the default table used by the query builder

enableMapKeysDiscovery.description: When enabled, the filter editor probes Map(...) columns for distinct keys to populate the key-suggestion dropdown. On large tables with high-cardinality maps this probe can scan billions of rows. Disable to suppress the probe — operators can still type Map keys manually. Defaults to enabled.

enableRowLimit.description: Enable using the Grafana row limit setting to limit the number of rows returned from Clickhouse. Ensure the appropriate permissions are set for your user. Only supported for Grafana >= 11.0.0. Defaults to false.

enableSchemaCache.description: Gates the in-process cache that memoizes system.tables / system.columns / DISTINCT column-value lookups used by the query builder. Not exposed in the configuration editor; backend defaults it to true when unset.

forwardGrafanaHeaders.description: Forward Grafana HTTP Headers to datasource.

hideTableNameInAdhocFilters.description: Show only column names in ad hoc filter keys instead of the full "table.column" format. This simplifies the filter interface when working with schemas that have many tables. Defaults to false.

httpHeaders.description: Add Custom HTTP headers when querying the database

value.description: Empty when the header is stored securely; the encrypted value lives in secureJsonData under secureHttpHeaders.<Header Name>.

contextColumns.description: Comma separated list of column names to use for identifying a log's source

defaultDatabase.description: the default database used by the logs query builder

defaultTable.description: the default table used by the logs query builder

filterTimeColumn.description: A lower precision column for filtering logs by timestamp

selectContextColumns.description: When enabled, will always include context columns in log queries

showLogLinks.description: Show "View logs" links on trace_id/traceid fields.

timeColumn.description: Column for the log timestamp, used for high precision sorting

path.description: Additional URL path for HTTP requests

protocol.description: Native or HTTP for server protocol

queryTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for read queries

schemaCacheTTLSeconds.description: Controls how long schema-introspection results are considered fresh. Not exposed in the configuration editor; backend defaults it to 60 when unset or <=0.

secure.description: Toggle on if the connection is secure

signalType.description: What kind of data does this table contain?

tlsAuthWithCACert.description: Needed for verifying self-signed TLS Certs

defaultDatabase.description: the default database used by the trace query builder

defaultTable.description: the default table used by the trace query builder

durationUnit.description: Unit used by your Duration column. OTel stores nanoseconds; other schemas often use milliseconds or seconds.

flattenNested.description: Enable if your traces table was created with flatten_nested=1

instrumentationLibraryNameColumn.description: Column for the instrumentation library name

instrumentationLibraryVersionColumn.description: Column for the instrumentation library version

parentSpanIdColumn.description: Column for the parent span ID

showTraceLinks.description: Show "View trace" links on trace_id/traceid fields.

statusCodeColumn.description: Column for the trace status code

statusMessageColumn.description: Column for the trace status message

traceEventsColumnPrefix.description: Prefix for the events column (Events.Timestamp, Events.Name, etc.)

traceLinksColumnPrefix.description: Prefix for the trace references column (Links.TraceId, Links.TraceState, etc.)

traceTimestampTableSuffix.description: Suffix appended to the traces table name to locate a companion index keyed by TraceId with Start/End columns. When such a table exists, trace ID lookups narrow the main query to a small time window instead of scanning the whole table. Leave blank to use the OTel default (_trace_id_ts).

version.description: Plugin version that last wrote this configuration. Stamped by the config editor's useConfigDefaults hook on every save; frontend-only.
